caption: The video shows a close-up view of the engine compartment of a vehicle, with the hood open and various components visible. The camera focuses on the left side of the engine bay, highlighting the inner fender and some mechanical parts. The surrounding area outside the vehicle is lush with greenery, indicating that the car is parked outdoors, possibly in a garden or a backyard. There are some tools and equipment scattered around, suggesting that maintenance or repair work might be underway. The scene is well-lit, likely due to natural daylight, which illuminates the details of the engine and its surroundings clearly.
